mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_content (content_key, title, body_html, updated_at, updated_by) VALUES (#{contentKey}, #{title}, #{bodyHtml}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{updatedBy}) ON CONFLICT (content_key) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, body_html = EXCLUDED.body_html, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_by = EXCLUDED.updated_by
